name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who hits it and when?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. For protocol-facing behavior, note how it
interacts with the revision/transform model.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope check

SyncPad intentionally excludes accounts/auth/permissions, a database, a
document history UI, rich text, and mobile layout polish — see the
[engineering spec](../../docs/syncpad-engineering-doc.md). Is this request
within scope?
